original: Your womb rumbles audibly as the plant-matter inside you reacts to something, and your [pc.belly] visibly swells."+({var0}?" Mmmm, another batch of pods are growing inside you, fertilized by your latest tryst.":" The stuff the venus pitcher put inside you... it’s growing! The latest pitcher must have done something to it... fertilized it, perhaps.")+" A few droplets of pale-green slime leak from your lips"+({var2}.isCrotchGarbed()?" into your "+{var2}+".":".")
